block_00: Your proof of address will expire soon
block_02: We would like to inform you that your proof of address will expire in
block_03: day(s) and your account will no longer be verified. As per the Anti-money Laundering and Terrorist Financing Law, the Company is obliged to maintain and request updated and valid proof of address in order for the trading account to remain valid and open.
block_04: Therefore, you are kindly requested to provide us with one of the following:
block_05: Utility bill (electricity, phone, water, internet, etc.);
block_06: Bank statement or letter regarding your bank account;
block_07: Tax bill from your tax authority;
block_08: Stamped residence certificate from your municipality.
block_09: The document to be provided must clearly show your full name, address, logo or stamp of the company/bank/municipality and the date of issue (not older than 6 months).
block_10: Please provide only full or half page copies of the document (cropped or blurry documents shall not be accepted).
block_11: We appreciate your cooperation in this matter and remain at your disposal.

block_16: Thank you for choosing our company!
